targets.details:
Dear Friend
I am writing this to apologize deeply about the issue of you having to find out from someone how I expressed my concern about how you went about to doing things. I am truly sorry I should have voiced my concerns with you from the very beginning. I hope you find a place in your heart to forgive me.
A regretful friend
targets.initial_text:
Dear Friend

I am writing this letter to apologize deeply for what happened recently. I cannot believe you had to find out from someone else how I had expressed my concerns about how you went about doing things. That was not fair on you my friend and it has been weighing heavy on my heart ever since I heard.

I am truly sorry. I should have come straight to you from the very beginning and told you exactly how I felt, face to face, like a real friend should. Instead I went the long way around and that made the wound much deeper than it needed to be. Oh I really hate myself for that.

You know how much our friendship means to me, all these years and all the memories we have built together. Please find a place in your heart to forgive me. Love you loads.

A regretful friend

targets.details:
thank you for visiting me in hospital
very scary time of my life when your support was hugely important
you travelled a long distance to get here and it is very much appreciated
targets.initial_text: My dear friend Steve was the kind of person who always showed up, no matter what the circumstance, and he certainly proved that to me again last month when I was lying in that hospital bed. The fact that you traveled such a long distance just to come and sit with me for a few hours is something I will never be able to repay, and frankly I would not even know how to begin. That was a very scary time of my life, more frightening than I let on to most people, and your support in those days was hugely important to me in ways that words can hardly capture. I remember waking up and seeing you there in that uncomfortable hospital chair and thinking how lucky I am to have a friend of so many years who would drop everything for me. Thank you, truly, from the bottom of my heart. You will always have my deepest gratitude.

targets.details:
Hey mate, how is it going? it's been too long.
There has been a huge distance between us
I am on holiday in Corfu on the very same beach we had one of the greatest night's drinking of our lives
It triggered some wonderful memories and made me determined to keep in closer touch and make an effort to see you soon
targets.initial_text:
Hey mate, how is it going? It's been too long, far too long, and I have been carrying a quiet bit of guilt about the huge distance there has been between us these past few years. Life has a way of pulling you in a hundred different directions, but that is no excuse for letting a friendship like ours drift the way it has.

I am writing this from Corfu of all places, sitting on the very same beach we had one of the greatest night's drinking of our lives. I cannot quite believe I am back here. Watching the sun go down over that water this evening triggered some wonderful memories, the kind that make you laugh out loud at nothing on your own with a beer in your hand.

It has made me determined to keep in closer touch and to make a proper effort to see you soon. Let's not leave it another year, mate. Drop me a line when you can.

All the best,

targets.details:
To show empathy and understanding of challenges
Emphasize their positive qualities ,dont give up
focus on the present moment, to take things one step at a time
ending with a message of hope,
targets.initial_text:
hey my love,

im writing this letter to remind you that i see you and i understand what you are going through. i know things have been heavy and i know there are days where you feel like you are carrying too much. i want you to know that you are not alone in this, im right here with you.

you are one of the strongest people i know, you have such a beautiful heart and a way of making people feel seen, please dont give up on yourself now. just take it one step at a time, dont worry about tomorrow yet, focus on today and what you can do today only. small steps still count.

i really believe better days are coming for you. just hold on a little longer my love and trust the process. just know that i love you so much and im always here for you no matter what

targets.details:
special moments we have shared together
my commitment loving and cherishing my partner
thanking my partner for being in my life
vow to grow old together, how long we have came
targets.initial_text:
im writing this vow to you my love, to show how grateful i am that we are finally here standing in front of everyone we love. its been a long road and we have been through alot together. i remember the day we got stuck in the rain and ended up dancing in the parking lot, that is one of the moments i will carry with me forever.

i promise to love and cherish you always, in good days and in bad, when life is easy and when life is heavy. i thank you for being in my life, for picking me up when i was at my lowest and for celebrating me at my highest. you are the best thing that ever happened to me.

i vow to grow old with you, look how far we have came already. im never letting go, i love you so much
